'''''Revival''''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

The [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] supported the Alliance's [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third]] and [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleets]]' at the [[Blockade of Corellia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
